changelog: Mobile / tablet Home: Replaced the tiny page-dot indicator with a horizontally-scrollable section tab bar. Every section name (For You, Discover, Themes, Sports, Movies, Series, Collections, Genres, Decades) is now visible and tappable — no more guessing where Themes lives or whether you can swipe between pages.
Mobile: Sports tab added as a placeholder for v1.44.53 — full Live Sports & PPV mobile experience ports from TV in v1.44.54.
All v1.44.42 → v1.44.52 features still in place.
